app.title: Statecharts: hierarchical state machines
app.author: sph
app.description: Statecharts are hierarchical state machines for managing complex behavior.
proposed_tests: Install the library via npm, create a machine, and add a single transition
Run a demo app built with statecharts, measure execution time
Create a complex machine and verify that it compiles without errors
Compare performance of statecharts vs a traditional, hand-coded state machine implementation
